## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss expectations for Content Managers and address challenges with Atlas for Prophecy client](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Artifacts (writing guidelines, company context, personas) need significant improvement to enhance output quality](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Atlas pipeline is malleable; can be customized with additional steps for client-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [CM role involves proactive problem-solving, understanding inputs/outputs, and ensuring artifacts are up-to-date](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Immediate actions: use AI assist tool, file ticket for pipeline enhancement, reach out to improve artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Challenges and Artifact Quality

  - [Current Prophecy artifacts are undercooked, impacting article quality](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Comparison to Ambit's detailed artifacts shows potential for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Robust artifacts lead to better outputs and reduced client review cycles](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [Process for updating artifacts involves collating data from various sources (calls, feedback, docs)](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Content Manager Expectations and Responsibilities

  - [Start from Statement of Work (SOW) to understand deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Proactively identify and address issues, communicating with ME/director](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Master inputs/outputs of Atlas pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Ensure artifacts are up-to-date and incorporate latest client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2653.0)
  - [Balance using Atlas with meeting client deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### Atlas Pipeline Customization

  - [Assignment direction field now supports rich text, allowing more detailed instructions](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Can override default article structures and formats](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Potential for adding custom steps (e.g., adherence check) for client-specific rules](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
  - [Use AI assist tool to refine outputs post-fact check](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)

### Client-Specific Challenges (Prophecy)

  - [Previous team used different tools (Perplexity, Claude, Gemini)](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Current output may not meet SEO/reader value expectations](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Client has specific formatting preferences (e.g., serial comma usage)](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2704.0)
  - [Recent strategy shift needs to be reflected in artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2685.0)

### Atlas Improvement Strategies

  - [Use assignment direction field to guide article structure and content focus](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Experiment with calling/not calling personas in brief generation](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Request pipeline enhancements for client-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
  - [Continuously provide feedback on Atlas performance to improve the platform](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Use AI assist tool to refine Atlas outputs with client-specific instructions](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
  - [File ticket for additional pipeline step to reinforce specific client rules](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2904.0)
  - [Reach out to Daryl/Eticham about reworking Prophecy artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
  - [Contact client for exact formatting/style preferences](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
  - [Review and apply Matthew's Atlas onboarding guides (overall guide and inputs/outputs guide)](https://fathom.video/share/48cp5aQH7bgT9aBQNeWaUg31SrgE3aJ-?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
